# Europa Universalis V — Gameplay Mechanics Research Summary for CLI Design

## 1. Core Gameplay Loop

EU5 is a real-time-with-pause grand strategy game set from 1337 to ~1821. The player controls a nation-state (one of hundreds) and makes decisions across diplomacy, warfare, economy, domestic politics, and exploration simultaneously.
